---
title: Events
---

This page lists all curated frost events currently included in the benchmark dataset.

## Event Summary

| Event ID | Event Name | Region | Dates | Season | Severity | Details |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| australia_2024_sa_spring_frost | South Australia Spring Frosts | South Australia (Eyre Peninsula, Mid North) | 2024-09-15 to 2024-10-05 | Spring (Southern Hemisphere) | high | [View event](australia_2024_sa_spring_frost/event.qmd) |

## Notes

- Spatial boundaries are approximate and intended for regional-scale analysis.
- Evidence quality and impact reporting may vary across events.
